assessor_1_raw: Cardholder pattern learning across splits is the intended model behavior, not leakage. Temporal split prevents future information. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: 90-day investigation window provides label completeness guarantee. Standard for operational fraud systems. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: AUPRC as secondary metric complements precision at 1% FPR for the extreme imbalance scenario. Both metrics are appropriate. Verdict: defense_wins.
